# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-controlplane
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      statusPort: 15021
      
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        statusPort: 15021
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 2000m
            memory: 1024Mi
    
    pilot:
      env:
        PILOT_ENABLE_STATUS: "true"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: istio-sidecar-injector
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  values: |
    {
      "global": {
        "proxy": {
          "statusPort": 15021,
          "readinessInitialDelaySeconds": 1,
          "readinessFailureThreshold": 30
        }
      }
    }

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-sidecar
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "*/*"
  workloadSelector: {}

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-debug
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: envoy-admin
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - name: admin
    port: 15000
    targetPort: 15000
    protocol: TCP
  selector:
    istio: pilot

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-envoy-admin
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 15000
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 15021

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-instructions
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  README.md: |
    # Envoy Admin Interface Access
    
    The Envoy admin interface is now accessible on port 15000 for all sidecar proxies.
    
    ## Accessing Admin Endpoints
    
    To access the admin interface from a pod:
    
    1. Port-forward to a specific pod:
       kubectl port-forward <pod-name> -n <namespace> 15000:15000
    
    2. Access endpoints locally:
       curl http://localhost:15000/config_dump
       curl http://localhost:15000/stats
       curl http://localhost:15000/clusters
       curl http://localhost:15000/listeners
       curl http://localhost:15000/runtime
       curl http://localhost:15000/server_info
       curl http://localhost:15000/certs
       curl http://localhost:15000/stats/prometheus
    
    ## Direct Pod Access
    
    From within the cluster or another pod:
    kubectl exec -it <pod-name> -n <namespace> -c istio-proxy -- curl http://localhost:15000/config_dump
    kubectl exec -it <pod-name> -n <namespace> -c istio-proxy -- curl http://localhost:15000/stats
    kubectl exec -it <pod-name> -n <namespace> -c istio-proxy -- curl http://localhost:15000/clusters
    
    ## Common Admin Endpoints
    
    - /config_dump - Full Envoy configuration
    - /stats - All Envoy statistics
    - /stats/prometheus - Prometheus formatted stats
    - /clusters - Cluster manager information
    - /listeners - Listener information
    - /server_info - Server information
    - /ready - Readiness probe
    - /healthcheck/fail - Force health check to fail
    - /healthcheck/ok - Force health check to pass
    - /certs - Certificate information
    - /runtime - Runtime values
    - /memory - Memory allocation info
    - /contention - Mutex contention stats
    
    ## Filtering Stats
    
    curl http://localhost:15000/stats?filter=cluster.outbound
    curl http://localhost:15000/stats?filter=http
    curl http://localhost:15000/stats/prometheus?filter=istio

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-reader
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods", "pods/log", "pods/portforward"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "create"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods/exec"]
  verbs: ["create", "get"]

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-reader-binding
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: envoy-admin-reader
subjects:
- kind: Group
  name: system:authenticated
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-debug-client
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: debug-client
spec:
  containers:
  - name: debug
    image: curlimages/curl:latest
    command: ["/bin/sh"]
    args: ["-c", "while true; do sleep 30; done"]
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 10m
        memory: 32Mi
      limits:
        cpu: 100m
        memory: 128Mi
